statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)
25a26,28
> Mar 18 19:55:30 151235753a64 pmlogctl[1318715]: Warning: is another pmlogctl job running concurrently?
> Mar 18 19:55:30 151235753a64 pmlogctl[1318715]: ---------- 1 root root 8 Mar 18 19:54 /etc/pcp/pmlogger/lock
> Mar 18 19:55:30 151235753a64 pmlogctl[1318715]: Error: failed to acquire exclusive lock (/etc/pcp/pmlogger/lock) ...
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
